titleStmt.title: The Consul General at Peiping ( (Clubb) ) to the Secretary of State

div.head: The Consul General at Peiping ( Clubb ) to the Secretary of State
div.p: Per NCNA item October 1 published Hsin Min Pao October 2;

quote.p: “Foreign Minister Chou En-lai of the Central People’s Government today sent Chairman Mao Tze-tung’s public statement by letter to all foreign governments.

Minister Chou sent it by official notes to all old [garble] Consular offices of various countries in Peking, requesting them to transmit to their countries’ governments. In cases of those without Consulates in Peking but having Embassies or Legations in Nanking, then they were sent to the old Embassies or Legations of various countries in Nanking.” (Here Hsin Min Pao prints text covering letter, carries also text public statement.)

div.p: Tientsin by mail. Repeated Nanking 1127, Shanghai 1032.
